description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named tests that runs on push and pull request events. Use a matrix strategy to test with Python 3.6, 3.7, 3.8, and 3.9 on ubuntu-20.04. For each Python version, check out the code, install system and Python dependencies, run tests with pytest and mypy, and upload coverage to Coveralls. After all test jobs finish, run a final Coveralls step in a python:3-slim container on ubuntu-latest to complete the coverage report.
